name: Italian Zucchini Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and cut off the ends of the zucchini.
2. Cut into 3/4-inch slices.
3. Combine water and seasoned salt in a saucepan; pour over zucchini.
4. Cook until crisp-tender, then drain.
5. Add olives; set aside to cool.
6. In a bowl, combine olive oil, wine vinegar, salt, paprika, pepper, sugar, and basil leaves.
7. Spear the garlic on a toothpick and add it to the dressing.
8. Pour the dressing over the zucchini mixture in a large bowl; stir gently.
9. Chill overnight in the refrigerator.
10. Remove the garlic before serving.
11. Peel the avocado and cut into slices.
12. Add the avocado slices to the salad and stir.
13. Garnish with pimento or red pepper.
14. Serve 12 servings.
